zh.Constantinople, Istanbul, Turkey: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Michael Doukas於1061年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾時，他的父親Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II25歲，母親Maria of Bulgaria8歲。他於1083年與Euphrosyne在土耳其易斯坦波爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1118年1月9日享年57歲。

zh-hans.Constantinople, Istanbul, Turkey: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Michael Doukas于1061年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾时，他的父亲Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II25岁，母亲Maria of Bulgaria8岁。他于1083年与Euphrosyne在土耳其易斯坦波爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1118年1月9日享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Doukas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Spyros, Anastasios, Aphrodite, Apostolos, Athanasios, Constantine, Costas, Dimitrios, Kalliopi, Kimon, Panagiotis.
Greek: from medieval Greek doukas ‘duke, lord’, from Latin dux. This was the name of a family of imperial rank in medieval Byzantium.

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

en.lifeSummary: When Michael Doukas was born in 1061, in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkiye, his father, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, was 25 and his mother, Maria of Bulgaria, was 8. He married Euphrosyne in 1083, in İstanbul, Türkiye. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 9 January 1118, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Michael Doukas est né en 1061, à Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquie, son père, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Maria of Bulgaria, avait 8 ans. Il a épousé Euphrosyne en 1083, à İstanbul, Turquie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 janvier 1118, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Michael Doukas 1061 in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war sein Vater Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II 25 und seine Mutter Maria of Bulgaria 8. Er hat 1083 in İstanbul, Türkei Euphrosyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Januar 1118 im Alter von 57 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Michael Doukas è nato il nel 1061 nel Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turchia, il suo padre, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Maria of Bulgaria, aveva 8 anni. Lui sposato Euphrosyne nel 1083, nel İstanbul, Turchia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 gennaio 1118, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.Constantinople, Istanbul, Turkey: トルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブル
ja.lifeSummary: Michael Doukasが1061年にトルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブルで生まれた時，父Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire IIは25歳，母Maria of Bulgariaは8歳であった。1083年にトルコイスタンブルでEuphrosyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1118年1月9日に57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Michael Doukas(이)가 1061년 튀르키예 이스탠불 팻이h 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria of Bulgaria(은)는 8세였다. 그는 1083년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 Euphrosyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1118년 1월 9일 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Michael Doukas nasceu em 1061, em Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Maria of Bulgaria, tinha 8 anos. Ele casou-se com Euphrosyne em 1083, em İstanbul, Turquia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1118, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Michael Doukas родился в 1061 г. в местности истанбул, фатих, истанбул, Турция, его отцу по имени Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria of Bulgaria, 8. Он женился на женщине по имени Euphrosyne в 1083 г. в местности истанбул, Турция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 января 1118 г. в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Michael Doukas nació en 1061, en Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Maria of Bulgaria, tenía 8 años. Se casó con Euphrosyne en 1083, en İstanbul, Turquía. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de enero de 1118, a la edad de 57 años.
